[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010000 1
1 00000000 a
2 00000010 1
3 00010100 2
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000100 1
7 00001000 1

01 10 01000100 2
12 21 00001100 2
23 32 00001101 3
34 43 00001000 1 match 7
45 54 00010000 1 match 0
56 65 00000000 a match 1 4 5
67 76 00000010 1 match 2
70 07 00010100 2 match 3

02 20 00000100 1 match 6
13 31 00001100 2
24 42 00001000 1 match 7
35 53 00000000 a match 1 4 5
46 64 00000010 1 match 2
57 75 00010000 1 match 0
60 06 01000000 1
71 17 00000100 1 match 6

03 30 00000100 1 match 6
14 41 00001000 1 match 7
25 52 00100000 1
36 63 00000001 1
47 74 00010010 2
50 05 00010000 1 match 0
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 10000100 2

04 40 00010000 1 match 0
15 51 00000000 a match 1 4 5
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 00000100 1 match 6
